item.title: What I'd Tell My 30-Year-Old Self About RETIRING ON $500K
item.description: Ohhhh what I'd give for a do over. If I started investing at 30 instead of 40 I'd be much better off than just a $500K retirement. Here are 10 things I'd tell my 30-year-old self about retiring on $50...
